ember_touched_mace.name: Ember-Touched Mace
ember_touched_mace.description: A blackstone mace whose head was infused with a fragment of the Charred Ancient's ember during its forging. The weapon retains a constant warmth and leaves faint scorch marks on whatever it strikes.

goblin_smasher.name: Goblin Smasher
goblin_smasher.description: A heavy iron mace that has cracked enough goblin skulls to earn a name.

compact_fighting_knife.name: Compact Fighting Knife
compact_fighting_knife.description: A short blade salvaged from Venture Co. equipment, perfectly balanced for quick stabbing.

grimtotem_spirit_staff.name: Grimtotem Spirit Staff
grimtotem_spirit_staff.description: A staff carved from Stonetalon pine and inlaid with totemic bone fragments from Grimtotem shamanic rites. Purified by night elf priests, it now channels clean druidic energy rather than dark totemic magic.

venture_co_mining_pick.name: Venture Co. Mining Pick
venture_co_mining_pick.description: A heavy-headed mining pick recovered from the Venture Company operation in Windshear Crag. Originally designed for cleaving rock, it works equally well on Horde skulls.

darkwhisper_rending_axe.name: Darkwhisper Rending Axe
darkwhisper_rending_axe.description: A fel-iron axe wielded by the Darkwhisper Lord himself, its blade still vibrating with the demon's contained fury.

frostsong_scepter.name: Frostsong Scepter
frostsong_scepter.description: The sacred scepter of the Winterfall High Shaman, its head carved from a block of enchanted ice that never melts.

warlord_naga_trident.name: Warlord's Naga Trident
warlord_naga_trident.description: The three-pronged trident of the Shattered Strand Warlord, perfectly balanced for the naga's serpentine fighting style.

whittling_knife.name: Whittling Knife
whittling_knife.description: A sharp utility knife equally useful for woodwork and close combat.

stone_tomahawk.name: Stone Tomahawk
stone_tomahawk.description: A hand-chipped stone axe, balanced and brutal.

azure_tempest_edge.name: Azure Tempest Edge
azure_tempest_edge.description: A blade forged from a fragment of Elder Azure Drake scale, crackling with contained storm-lightning along its edge.

stonetalon_peak_greataxe.name: Stonetalon Peak Greataxe
stonetalon_peak_greataxe.description: A massive two-handed axe forged in the Sentinel armory at Stonetalon Peak from the iron-rich ore of the mountains. Awarded to warriors who clear the harpy threat from the peak's upper reaches.

braves_axe.name: Brave's Axe
braves_axe.description: A broad two-handed axe carried by tauren braves defending Camp Narache.

elders_cane.name: Elder's Cane
elders_cane.description: A gnarled walking staff passed down by a tauren elder.

withered_staff.name: Withered Staff
withered_staff.description: A dried-out staff that creaks ominously when swung.

rusty_hatchet.name: Rusty Hatchet
rusty_hatchet.description: A hatchet with a heavily corroded blade.

shadow_lord_staff.name: Shadow Lord's Staff
shadow_lord_staff.description: The staff of the Jaedenar Shadow Lord, carved from the heartwood of a corrupted ancient and capped with a shard of pure shadow crystal.

raynewood_ancient_staff.name: Raynewood Ancient Staff
raynewood_ancient_staff.description: A staff hewn from the heartwood of Raynewood Retreat's oldest tree. Though corruption twisted the ancient, the wood itself still channels pure druidic power.

chieftain_headtaker_axe.name: Chieftain's Headtaker Axe
chieftain_headtaker_axe.description: The Shatterspear Chieftain's personal axe, its blade notched from years of combat. Now in the hands of the hero who ended his reign, it is proof that Darkshore's hidden vale has been secured.

wolfs_fury_axe.name: Wolf's Fury Axe
wolfs_fury_axe.description: A hand axe with a howling wolf motif etched into its blade. Carried by Ashenvale hunters as both tool and trophy of the forest's predators.

xavian_demonslayer.name: Xavian Demonslayer
xavian_demonslayer.description: A silver-edged sword forged specifically to slay the demon-touched. The Sentinel armory distributes these to squads tasked with cleansing Xavian's satyr enclave.

sharpened_letter_opener.name: Sharpened Letter Opener
sharpened_letter_opener.description: Hardly a weapon at all ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â but its edge has been filed to a worrying keenness.

crude_bastard_sword.name: Crude Bastard Sword
crude_bastard_sword.description: A crudely forged long sword with a notched blade.

beaten_battle_axe.name: Beaten Battle Axe
beaten_battle_axe.description: A dented two-handed axe that has seen too many battles.

carpenters_mallet.name: Carpenter's Mallet
carpenters_mallet.description: A woodworking mallet repurposed as a blunt weapon.

jadefire_curved_blade.name: Jadefire Curved Blade
jadefire_curved_blade.description: The crescent-bladed weapon of the Jadefire Warlord, its edge permanently stained green from decades of fel energy coursing through the metal.

feeble_sword.name: Feeble Sword
feeble_sword.description: A thin sword barely worthy of the name.

cracked_sledge.name: Cracked Sledge
cracked_sledge.description: A heavy sledgehammer with a crack running through the head.

rock_mace.name: Rock Mace
rock_mace.description: A stone-headed mace, crude but heavy.

durotar_quarterstaff.name: Durotar Quarterstaff
durotar_quarterstaff.description: A tall staff carved from hardwood native to Durotar.

durotar_hatchet.name: Durotar Hatchet
durotar_hatchet.description: A compact axe well-suited for the harsh terrain of Durotar.

durotar_dagger.name: Durotar Dagger
durotar_dagger.description: A short blade etched with Durotar clan markings.

gordunni_crusher.name: Gordunni Crusher
gordunni_crusher.description: A squat, brutal mace looted from a Gordunni ogre. The rune-carved head weighs more than most shields and leaves impressions in stone when swung hard enough.

tiragarde_battle_mace.name: Tiragarde Battle Mace
tiragarde_battle_mace.description: A heavy flanged mace taken from the armory of Tiragarde Keep.

grimtotem_warstaff.name: Grimtotem Warstaff
grimtotem_warstaff.description: A shaman's staff recovered from the Grimtotem, carved from ironwood and inlaid with elemental runes. Dark lightning crackles at its tip even when no spell is being cast.

kultiran_requisitioned_blade.name: Kul'Tiran Requisitioned Blade
kultiran_requisitioned_blade.description: A standard-issue blade requisitioned from a fallen Kul'Tiran soldier.

galak_high_warlord_blade.name: Galak High Warlord's Blade
galak_high_warlord_blade.description: The massive two-handed war axe of the Galak High Warlord, a weapon large enough that a human would struggle to lift it. Its blade is etched with the names of every tauren settlement the High Warlord has driven out of Thousand Needles.

magram_centurion_axe.name: Magram Centurion Axe
magram_centurion_axe.description: A heavy axe looted from an elite Magram centurion. The blade edge is well-worn but still holds a keen edge.

maraudon_earthstone_scepter.name: Maraudon Earthstone Scepter
maraudon_earthstone_scepter.description: A scepter of living earth crystal formed deep within Maraudon. It channels raw stone energy, crackling with power when struck against the ground.

swampwalker_root_staff.name: Swampwalker Root Staff
swampwalker_root_staff.description: A gnarled staff grown from a swampwalker's severed root arm. The heartwood hums with earth energy and sprouts tiny leaves in dry air.

orcish_hand_mace.name: Orcish Hand Mace
orcish_hand_mace.description: A war mace forged by orcish craftsmen, well-balanced for close combat.

grimscale_high_oracle_scepter.name: Grimscale High Oracle's Scepter
grimscale_high_oracle_scepter.description: The coral scepter of the Grimscale High Oracle, crackling with stored tidal lightning. A caster who wields it can feel the power of the deep currents flowing through their spells.

elder_crone_cursewood_staff.name: Elder Crone's Cursewood Staff
elder_crone_cursewood_staff.description: The Grimtotem Elder Crone's personal staff, carved from a lightning-struck thornwood branch and aged for decades on Darkcloud's summit. The dark enchantment has been cleansed, but the elemental attunement remains remarkably potent.

kolkani_mace.name: Kolkanis's Mace
kolkani_mace.description: The iron-headed mace wielded by Warlord Kolkanis in battle.

sandfury_idol_scepter.name: Sandfury Idol Scepter
sandfury_idol_scepter.description: A ceremonial scepter topped with the sacred idol of the Sandfury High Priest. Channels dark troll magic into every strike.

stonewood_hammer.name: Stonewood Hammer
stonewood_hammer.description: A two-handed hammer carved from dense Barrens stonewood.

galak_raider_axe.name: Galak Raider Axe
galak_raider_axe.description: A hand axe recovered from a Galak Windchaser's saddlebag, balanced for one-handed use at full gallop. Equally effective when wielded from the ground.

razorfen_battle_hatchet.name: Razorfen Battle Hatchet
razorfen_battle_hatchet.description: A wide-bladed hand axe recovered from the Razorfen outer fields. The blade is marked with the Razorfen clan's briar-spiral motif ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â now repurposed for those clearing the fields of quilboar.

thornweaver_staff.name: Thornweaver Staff
thornweaver_staff.description: A staff cut from the great thorned briar of the Overgrowth and stripped of its death-taint by Horde shamans. The briar wood still channels elemental earth energy with unusual efficiency.

charlga_skullscepter.name: Charlga's Skullscepter
charlga_skullscepter.description: Charlga Razorflank's personal ritual scepter, tipped with a carved quilboar skull and wound with silver death-runes. Purged of its necromantic corruption, it still carries potent shamanistic power.

quilboar_shamans_staff.name: Quilboar Shaman's Staff
quilboar_shamans_staff.description: A gnarled staff carved from Barrens thornwood and used in quilboar earth rites.

blemished_wooden_staff.name: Blemished Wooden Staff
blemished_wooden_staff.description: A weathered staff with notches and cracks from long years of use.

harpy_wing_clipper.name: Harpy Wing Clipper
harpy_wing_clipper.description: A curved blade designed to clip the wings of airborne targets.

jagged_dagger.name: Jagged Dagger
jagged_dagger.description: A serrated blade with an uneven edge, recovered from Skull Rock.

pointed_axe.name: Pointed Axe
pointed_axe.description: A sharp single-bladed axe honed to a wicked point.

stinging_mace.name: Stinging Mace
stinging_mace.description: A spiked iron mace recovered from the caves of Skull Rock.

steady_bastard_sword.name: Steady Bastard Sword
steady_bastard_sword.description: A well-balanced two-handed sword, reliable in any fight.

althalaxx_conjuror_staff.name: Althalaxx Conjuror's Staff
althalaxx_conjuror_staff.description: A dark runewood staff carried by senior Twilight Hammer conjurors in the Tower of Althalaxx. Its fel enchantments have been stripped and replaced with arcane attunement by Auberdine's enchanters.

spiked_club.name: Spiked Club
spiked_club.description: A heavy wooden club studded with iron spikes.

rusty_warhammer.name: Rusty Warhammer
rusty_warhammer.description: A two-handed warhammer pitted with rust.

sironas_brand.name: Sironas' Brand
sironas_brand.description: A crystalline eredar blade taken from the defeated Sironas. Its arcane edge still hums with the energy of Argus, the eredar homeworld.

priests_mace.name: Priest's Mace
priests_mace.description: A simple mace favored by traveling clerics.

worn_hatchet.name: Worn Hatchet
worn_hatchet.description: A small axe worn smooth from years of chopping.

commoners_sword.name: Commoner's Sword
commoners_sword.description: A plain sword carried by townsfolk for self-defense.

old_greatsword.name: Old Greatsword
old_greatsword.description: A well-worn two-handed sword that has seen better days.

fisherman_knife.name: Fisherman Knife
fisherman_knife.description: A small knife used for cleaning fish.

twisted_chanters_staff.name: Twisted Chanter's Staff
twisted_chanters_staff.description: A staff of Teldrassil heartwood warped by Gnarlpine corruption. Still holds a potent enchantment despite the taint.

large_axe.name: Large Axe
large_axe.description: A broad two-handed axe with a heavy iron head.

cudgel.name: Cudgel
cudgel.description: A blunt wooden club reinforced with iron bands.

wooden_mallet.name: Wooden Mallet
wooden_mallet.description: A heavy two-handed mallet with a dense wooden head.

gladius.name: Gladius
gladius.description: A short wide-bladed sword favored by soldiers.

tomahawk.name: Tomahawk
tomahawk.description: A one-handed throwing axe used for chopping and combat.

stiletto.name: Stiletto
stiletto.description: A slender needle-pointed dagger meant for piercing armor.

fang_of_the_fang.name: Fang of the Fang
fang_of_the_fang.description: A serpentine dagger carved from the fang of Lord Serpentis. It carries a faint venom pulsing with dream energy.

grellkin_smasher.name: Grellkin Smasher
grellkin_smasher.description: A short, heavy mace fashioned from Teldrassil ironwood. Light enough for an apprentice, solid enough to crack demon skulls.

walking_stick.name: Walking Stick
walking_stick.description: A sturdy wooden staff that doubles as a walking aid.

witchwing_glaive.name: Witchwing Glaive
witchwing_glaive.description: A heavy two-bladed glaive shaped after the weapons of Witchwing harpy slayers. Brutal but devastating.

billy_club.name: Billy Club
billy_club.description: A stout wooden club with a wrapped handle.

beatstick.name: Beatstick
beatstick.description: A crudely reinforced wooden club. Heavy, slow, and effective.

twilight_high_marshal_axe.name: Twilight High Marshal's Axe
twilight_high_marshal_axe.description: The personal weapon of the Twilight High Marshal, forged in the fires of a summoned elemental and quenched in silithid venom. It carries a faint tremor that never settles.

training_sword.name: Training Sword
training_sword.description: A full-size two-handed sword used in drills. Heavier than it looks.

long_bo_staff.name: Long Bo Staff
long_bo_staff.description: A long hardwood staff shaped and balanced for combat.

devilsaur_bone_maul.name: Devilsaur Bone Maul
devilsaur_bone_maul.description: A fearsome mace carved from the leg bone of an Un'Goro devilsaur. The dense material holds enchantments readily and strikes with bone-shattering force.

lumberjack_axe.name: Lumberjack Axe
lumberjack_axe.description: A single-bladed axe worn smooth from years of splitting wood.

flanged_mace.name: Flanged Mace
flanged_mace.description: A one-handed mace with rough flanges welded to the head.

practice_sword.name: Practice Sword
practice_sword.description: A blunted training sword, functional enough to wound in a real fight.

vector_coil_focus.name: Vector Coil Focus
vector_coil_focus.description: A staff housing a fragment of the Vector Coil's naaru power core, recovered after the device was purged of corruption. It channels the Light's healing and destructive power equally.

wood_chopper.name: Wood Chopper
wood_chopper.description: A heavy two-handed axe built for felling trees, repurposed for combat.

fine_scimitar.name: Fine Scimitar
fine_scimitar.description: A curved single-edged blade, well-balanced but poorly maintained.

simple_dagger.name: Simple Dagger
simple_dagger.description: A short, plain dagger with a worn leather grip.

carving_knife.name: Carving Knife
carving_knife.description: A thin-bladed knife meant for butchering game.

sunhawk_crusader_sword.name: Sunhawk Crusader Sword
sunhawk_crusader_sword.description: A blood elf battle sword recovered from a slain Sunhawk commander. Exquisitely balanced, its blade holds a faint arcane sharpening enchantment that never dulls.

scalping_tomahawk.name: Scalping Tomahawk
scalping_tomahawk.description: A wicked little axe favored by raiders.

short_bastard_sword.name: Short Bastard Sword
short_bastard_sword.description: A stout two-handed sword, shorter than most of its kind.

notched_shortsword.name: Notched Shortsword
notched_shortsword.description: A short sword with several notches worn into the blade's edge.

severing_axe.name: Severing Axe
severing_axe.description: A broad-bladed two-handed axe designed for powerful cleaving strikes.

crossroads_arbalest.name: Crossroads Arbalest
crossroads_arbalest.description: A compact recurve bow crafted in the Crossroads from Barrens hardwood. Reliable on open plains.

cadets_bow.name: Cadet's Bow
cadets_bow.description: A basic training bow issued to new recruits.

hunting_bow.name: Hunting Bow
hunting_bow.description: A simple bow favored by trackers and hunters.

rust_covered_blunderbuss.name: Rust-covered Blunderbuss
rust_covered_blunderbuss.description: A short-barreled firearm seized by rust. Firing it seems optimistic.

pellet_rifle.name: Pellet Rifle
pellet_rifle.description: A lightweight rifle that fires small pellets with reasonable accuracy.

hunting_rifle.name: Hunting Rifle
hunting_rifle.description: A long-barreled rifle used for hunting game across open terrain.

cheap_blunderbuss.name: Cheap Blunderbuss
cheap_blunderbuss.description: A poorly-made firearm prone to misfires.

compact_shotgun.name: Compact Shotgun
compact_shotgun.description: A short-barreled firearm, more bark than bite.

centaur_spine_longbow.name: Centaur Spine Longbow
centaur_spine_longbow.description: A longbow strung with centaur sinew, known for its punishing draw weight.

hickory_shortbow.name: Hickory Shortbow
hickory_shortbow.description: A compact bow carved from dense hickory wood.

shadow_wand.name: Shadow Wand
shadow_wand.description: A wand that channels a thin bolt of shadow energy.

orcish_battle_bow.name: Orcish Battle Bow
orcish_battle_bow.description: A powerful war bow crafted by orcish bowyers for use against the centaur.

fire_wand.name: Fire Wand
fire_wand.description: A wand that channels a weak gout of fire.

marines_longbow.name: Marine's Longbow
marines_longbow.description: A reinforced longbow favored by Kul'Tiran marines for long-range engagements.

feeble_shortbow.name: Feeble Shortbow
feeble_shortbow.description: A flimsy bow with a weak draw.

cracked_shortbow.name: Cracked Shortbow
cracked_shortbow.description: A shortbow with a hairline crack along the limb. Handle with care.

shadowflame_rod.name: Shadowflame Rod
shadowflame_rod.description: A bone-tipped wand humming with shadow and fire energy from the depths of Ragefire Chasm.

heavy_shortbow.name: Heavy Shortbow
heavy_shortbow.description: A reinforced shortbow with a heavier draw than most.

hornwood_recurve_bow.name: Hornwood Recurve Bow
hornwood_recurve_bow.description: A recurve bow carved from flexible hornwood.

laminated_recurve_bow.name: Laminated Recurve Bow
laminated_recurve_bow.description: A powerful recurve bow built from layered wood and sinew.

balanced_throwing_dagger.name: Balanced Throwing Dagger
balanced_throwing_dagger.description: A well-balanced dagger designed for throwing.

small_throwing_knife.name: Small Throwing Knife
small_throwing_knife.description: A small, balanced knife designed for throwing.

rough_arrow.name: Rough Arrow
rough_arrow.description: Crudely crafted arrows. Sold in stacks of 200.

sharp_arrow.name: Sharp Arrow
sharp_arrow.description: Well-crafted arrows with keen iron tips. Sold in stacks of 200.

light_shot.name: Light Shot
light_shot.description: Small lead bullets for use in firearms. Sold in stacks of 200.

silithus_scout_hood.name: Silithus Scout Hood
silithus_scout_hood.description: A sand-proofed leather hood worn by Cenarion scouts operating inside Twilight's Hammer territory. The eye-slits keep out the ever-present grit.

razormaw_ridge_helm.name: Razormaw Ridge Helm
razormaw_ridge_helm.description: A helm crafted from the reinforced ridge-scales of the slain sea serpent Razormaw. The interlocking ridge segments provide exceptional head protection.

searing_blade_hood.name: Searing Blade Hood
searing_blade_hood.description: A dark hooded cowl worn by the Searing Blade cult within Ragefire Chasm.

bloodfury_circlet.name: Bloodfury Circlet
bloodfury_circlet.description: A woven circlet adorned with Bloodfury harpy feathers and storm-touched beads. The windwitches wore these as a mark of their shamanic rank ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â the storm enchantment still crackles in the beads.

cobalt_scaled_helm.name: Cobalt Scaled Helm
cobalt_scaled_helm.description: A helm reinforced with interlocking cobalt dragon scales, granting both excellent protection and an intimidating appearance.

wyrmbog_matriarch_hide_helm.name: Wyrmbog Matriarch's Hide Helm
wyrmbog_matriarch_hide_helm.description: A helm carved from the skull plate of the Wyrmbog Matriarch. Near-impervious to fire damage and dense enough to deflect most physical blows, it marks the wearer as a slayer of dragons.

durotar_chain_coif.name: Durotar Chain Coif
durotar_chain_coif.description: A riveted chain coif forged in Durotar's sun-scorched smithies.

kolkar_raider_helm.name: Kolkar Raider Helm
kolkar_raider_helm.description: A horned iron helmet stripped from a Kolkar raider. The centaur's war helm has been modified for bipedal wearers ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â the original fit for a horse-skull is considerably wider.

eldarath_arcanist_hood.name: Eldarath Arcanist Hood
eldarath_arcanist_hood.description: A deep-cowled hood recovered from a Blood Elf Arcanist, stitched with ancient sunwell rune-script.

kolkar_warlords_helm.name: Kolkar Warlord's Helm
kolkar_warlords_helm.description: A battle-scarred helmet torn from the head of the Kolkar warlord.

exodar_sentinel_helm.name: Exodar Sentinel's Helm
exodar_sentinel_helm.description: A full-visored helm crafted in the Exodar's armory from naaru-forged metal. Awarded to those who defend the Draenei from the greatest threats on Azuremyst Isle.

green_winter_hat.name: Green Winter Hat
green_winter_hat.description: A floppy cloth hat, stuffed for warmth.

gordunni_warchief_helm.name: Gordunni Warchief's Helm
gordunni_warchief_helm.description: The ceremonial war-helm of the Gordunni Warchief, plated with sections of carved ogre bone. It is enormous, but the war enchantments within allow it to resize for any wearer who claims it through combat.

barrens_defender_helm.name: Barrens Defender's Helm
barrens_defender_helm.description: A riveted mail helm issued to soldiers who defend the Crossroads. The visor is cracked but the fit is dependable.

warsong_iron_helm.name: Warsong Iron Helm
warsong_iron_helm.description: A heavy iron helmet captured from a fallen Warsong commander. The clan's axe emblem has been filed off ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â now it serves the Alliance cause in Ashenvale.

deadwood_bone_helm.name: Deadwood Bone Helm
deadwood_bone_helm.description: A helm fashioned from the bone and hide of Deadwood furbolg shamans, ironically offering strong protection against the very corruption they channel.

ungoro_raptor_helm.name: Un'Goro Raptor Helm
ungoro_raptor_helm.description: A helm fashioned from the skull plate and hide of an Un'Goro ravasaur. Preferred by hunters who want to look the part.

nazzivus_amulet.name: Nazzivus Amulet
nazzivus_amulet.description: A satyr amulet recovered from Nazzivian and cleansed of its demonic enchantment by Draenei mages. The bound energy within now flows as pure restorative mana.

shatterspear_beaded_necklace.name: Shatterspear Beaded Necklace
shatterspear_beaded_necklace.description: A necklace strung with carved bone beads worn by the Shatterspear tribe's elite fighters. Taken as a trophy, it is a symbol of victory over the hidden vale's defenders.

kurken_totem_necklace.name: Kurken Totem Necklace
kurken_totem_necklace.description: A necklace carved from the tusk of the Kurken after the great beast's death. The Stillpine High Chief blessed it to honor the hero who freed their sacred grounds.

legash_felbark_shoulderpads.name: Legash Felbark Shoulderpads
legash_felbark_shoulderpads.description: Shoulder pads carved from demon-cursed bark bound in satyr hide, offering heavy protection and subtle intimidation.

frayfeather_quill_mantle.name: Frayfeather Quill Mantle
frayfeather_quill_mantle.description: Shoulder guards mounted with bound Frayfeather harpy quills that splay outward like a threatening display. The quills are hardened to the density of iron spikes.

galak_stormer_spaulders.name: Galak Stormer Spaulders
galak_stormer_spaulders.description: Mail spaulders recovered from a Galak Stormer, inlaid with lightning-rod copper strips that originally helped channel storm energy into the stormer's crystal. Now just solid, functional armor.

winterfall_pauldrons.name: Winterfall Pauldrons
winterfall_pauldrons.description: Heavy shoulderpads carved from furbolg bone and bound in frost-toughened hide, worn by Winterfall chieftains.

bristleback_spine_shoulders.name: Bristleback Spine Shoulders
bristleback_spine_shoulders.description: Leather pauldrons mounted with rows of harvested Bristleback quills. An effective deterrent against flanking strikes ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â anyone who swings at the wearer's shoulder learns quickly what 'bristleback' means.

ashenvale_pathfinder_shoulders.name: Ashenvale Pathfinder Shoulders
ashenvale_pathfinder_shoulders.description: Reinforced leather pauldrons designed for deep-forest scouting. The overlapping scales provide solid protection without restricting the bow arm.

kodo_hide_pauldrons.name: Kodo Hide Pauldrons
kodo_hide_pauldrons.description: Massive pauldrons crafted from the thick neck-hump hide of a Desolace kodo. Dense enough to absorb blows that would crack lesser armors.

darkmist_spider_mantle.name: Darkmist Spider Mantle
darkmist_spider_mantle.description: Shoulder guards reinforced with Darkmist chitin plates. The rigid exoskeleton material absorbs puncture damage while remaining surprisingly flexible.

sunscale_shoulder_pads.name: Sunscale Shoulder Pads
sunscale_shoulder_pads.description: Shoulder pads studded with golden scales of a Sunscale raptor. The overlapping scales catch light in rippling patterns.

grimtotem_warpauldrons.name: Grimtotem Warpauldrons
grimtotem_warpauldrons.description: Heavy mail pauldrons seized from a fallen Grimtotem brute. Sized for a tauren but cut down to fit smaller frames ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â they still carry the imposing presence of the Grimtotem clan.

carapace_shoulder_guards.name: Carapace Shoulder Guards
carapace_shoulder_guards.description: Shoulder plates carved from silithid carapace segments. The chitin naturally curves to deflect blows away from the neck.

sunhawk_sentinel_pauldrons.name: Sunhawk Sentinel Pauldrons
sunhawk_sentinel_pauldrons.description: Heavy pauldrons stripped from a fallen Sunhawk harbinger and re-engraved with Draenei protective runes. The naaru blessing on the metal has overwritten the blood elf enchantments.

bristlelimb_hide_vest.name: Bristlelimb Hide Vest
bristlelimb_hide_vest.description: A thick vest made from the pelts of the corrupted Bristlelimb furbolg. The dense fur provides exceptional durability in the cold coastal air of Azuremyst Isle.

worn_leather_vest.name: Worn Leather Vest
worn_leather_vest.description: A leather vest softened and thinned from years of wear.

moongraze_vest.name: Moongraze Vest
moongraze_vest.description: A vest of supple moongraze hide, well-tanned and stitched with Draenei hunting techniques. Prized by rangers who hunt the hills of Azuremyst Isle.

ragefire_chain_vest.name: Ragefire Chain Vest
ragefire_chain_vest.description: A heavy chainmail vest forged in the volcanic heat of Ragefire Chasm.

loose_chain_vest.name: Loose Chain Vest
loose_chain_vest.description: A mail vest that offers minimal protection due to its ill-fitting links.

kolkar_storm_robe.name: Kolkar Stormseer Robe
kolkar_storm_robe.description: The robe of a Kolkar Stormseer, woven from treated hide and threaded with lightning-conducting silver wire. The enchantment that once let the stormseer channel chain lightning is now safely grounded.

spidersilk_vest.name: Spidersilk Vest
spidersilk_vest.description: A vest woven from Webwood silk threads, surprisingly supple and resistant to moisture in Teldrassil's humid canopy.

primal_wraps.name: Primal Wraps
primal_wraps.description: A leather chest wrap bound with primal hide.

jaedenar_shadow_robes.name: Jaedenar Shadow Robes
jaedenar_shadow_robes.description: The robes of a Jaedenar warlock, their dark weave saturated with shadow energy that has leached from the walls of Shadow Hold itself.

gnarlpine_fur_vest.name: Gnarlpine Fur Vest
gnarlpine_fur_vest.description: A thick vest made from the pelts of the Gnarlpine furbolg. Dense enough to deflect most light blades.

ashenvale_sentinel_jerkin.name: Ashenvale Sentinel Jerkin
ashenvale_sentinel_jerkin.description: A supple leather jerkin worn by Ashenvale's night elf sentinels. Allows full range of movement while deflecting light blades and claws.

tribal_vest.name: Tribal Vest
tribal_vest.description: A leather vest decorated in tribal fashion.

darkcloud_shadowweave_robe.name: Darkcloud Shadowweave Robe
darkcloud_shadowweave_robe.description: A robe woven by the Grimtotem Elder Shamans atop Darkcloud Pinnacle, its fibers treated with shadow-dye extracted from the pinnacle's mineral springs. Purged of its dark enchantment, the exceptional weave quality remains.

rusted_chain_vest.name: Rusted Chain Vest
rusted_chain_vest.description: A mail chest piece worn dull with rust.

felwood_bearskin_vest.name: Felwood Bearskin Vest
felwood_bearskin_vest.description: A vest tanned from the thick hide of a Felwood Angerclaw bear, the fel residue in the fur strangely lending it extra durability.

highborne_spirit_robe.name: Highborne Spirit Robe
highborne_spirit_robe.description: A robe stitched from spirit-woven cloth recovered at the Ruins of Eldarath, still holding echoes of ancient Highborne magic.

rough_copper_vest.name: Rough Copper Vest
rough_copper_vest.description: A rough chest piece hammered together from copper bars.

flimsy_chain_vest.name: Flimsy Chain Vest
flimsy_chain_vest.description: A chain shirt with large gaps in the weave.

stonetalon_hunter_vest.name: Stonetalon Hunter Vest
stonetalon_hunter_vest.description: A light, close-fitting vest designed for the hunters and trackers who patrol Stonetalon's rocky passes. Cut to minimize noise on the mountain trails.

windscour_vestments.name: Windscour Vestments
windscour_vestments.description: Robes woven from cloth infused with trapped wind elemental essence. They ripple gently even in still air and reduce the risk of silithid venom taking hold.

ragged_leather_vest.name: Ragged Leather Vest
ragged_leather_vest.description: A scruffy leather vest held together by loose laces.

frosthide_vestments.name: Frosthide Vestments

raynewood_spiritweave_robe.name: Raynewood Spiritweave Robe

tough_jerky.description: Dried strips of meat. Restores 10% HP to the whole party. Cannot be used in combat.

rough_sharpening_stone.name: Rough Sharpening Stone
rough_sharpening_stone.description: A crudely ground sharpening stone. Temporarily hones a weapon's edge, granting +2 melee damage for 30 turns.

healthstone.name: Healthstone
healthstone.description: A stone imbued with fel energy that restores 200 HP to the most injured party member. Created by a warlock. Disappears if the warlock dies or is benched.

darnassian_bleu.description: A crumbly blue cheese from Darnassus. Restores 10% HP to the whole party. Cannot be used in combat.

plans_gemmed_copper_gauntlets.description: Teaches a blacksmith how to forge Gemmed Copper Gauntlets.

recipe_elixir_of_minor_agility.name: Recipe: Elixir of Minor Agility
recipe_elixir_of_minor_agility.description: Teaches an alchemist how to brew an Elixir of Minor Agility.

plans_runed_copper_breastplate.name: Plans: Runed Copper Breastplate

pattern_rugged_leather_pants.name: Pattern: Rugged Leather Pants
pattern_rugged_leather_pants.description: Teaches a leatherworker how to craft Rugged Leather Pants.

recipe_swiftness_potion.name: Recipe: Swiftness Potion
recipe_swiftness_potion.description: Teaches an alchemist how to brew a Swiftness Potion.

schematic_ez_thro_dynamite.name: Schematic: EZ-Thro Dynamite
schematic_ez_thro_dynamite.description: Teaches an engineer how to craft EZ-Thro Dynamite.

pattern_red_linen_vest.name: Pattern: Red Linen Vest
pattern_red_linen_vest.description: Teaches a tailor how to craft a Red Linen Vest.

pattern_white_leather_jerkin.name: Pattern: White Leather Jerkin
pattern_white_leather_jerkin.description: Teaches a leatherworker how to craft a White Leather Jerkin.

plans_copper_chain_vest.name: Plans: Copper Chain Vest
plans_copper_chain_vest.description: Teaches a blacksmith how to forge a Copper Chain Vest.

pattern_fine_leather_gloves.name: Pattern: Fine Leather Gloves
pattern_fine_leather_gloves.description: Teaches a leatherworker how to craft Fine Leather Gloves.

pattern_green_woolen_bag.name: Pattern: Green Woolen Bag
pattern_green_woolen_bag.description: Teaches a tailor how to sew a Green Woolen Bag.

rabbits_foot.name: Rabbit's Foot
rabbits_foot.description: A severed rabbit's foot. Some say it's lucky.

thick_hide.name: Thick Hide
thick_hide.description: An exceptionally dense hide from a fearsome beast.

heavy_hide.name: Heavy Hide
heavy_hide.description: A thick, durable hide from a powerful creature.

rugged_hide.name: Rugged Hide
rugged_hide.description: The toughest hide imaginable, taken from the most dangerous creatures alive.

medium_hide.name: Medium Hide
medium_hide.description: A solid hide from a moderately tough beast.

admirals_orders.name: Admiral's Orders
admirals_orders.description: A sealed envelope bearing Admiral Proudmoore's personal wax seal, found among the papers at Tiragarde Keep.

searing_blade_orders.name: Searing Blade Orders
searing_blade_orders.description: Encrypted dispatch orders bearing the sigil of the Searing Blade cult.

kolkar_attack_plan.name: Kolkar Attack Plan
kolkar_attack_plan.description: A leather-bound tactical scroll outlining the Kolkar centaur's coordinated assault on Horde settlements in Durotar.

zalaphil_seal.name: Zalaphil's Seal
zalaphil_seal.description: The command seal of Watch Commander Zalaphil, stripped from his body as proof of his defeat.

taillasher_egg.name: Taillasher Egg
taillasher_egg.description: A mottled egg laid by a bloodtalon taillasher in a nest among the Echo Isles rocks.

crawler_mucus.name: Crawler Mucus
crawler_mucus.description: A vial of thick, translucent mucus collected from a surf crawler's carapace joints.

minshinas_skull.name: Minshina's Skull
minshinas_skull.description: The skull of Minshina, a troll student killed by Zalazane. His spirit flickers dimly within, trapped by dark magic.

durotar_tiger_fur.name: Durotar Tiger Fur
durotar_tiger_fur.description: A pelt stripped from a Durotar tiger. The fur is thick and striped with dark markings.

intact_makrura_eye.name: Intact Makrura Eye

chipped_claw.description: A worn claw, chipped from years of use.

trophy_swoop_quill.name: Trophy Swoop Quill

prairie_alpha_tooth.name: Prairie Alpha Tooth

plainstrider_scale.name: Plainstrider Scale

swoop_gizzard.name: Swoop Gizzard

prairie_wolf_paw.name: Prairie Wolf Paw

light_hide.name: Light Hide
light_hide.description: A thin but intact animal hide.

rugged_leather.name: Rugged Leather
rugged_leather.description: The hardest leather, stripped from the toughest creatures in the world.

dry_salt_lick.name: Dry Salt Lick

sack_of_supplies.name: Sack of Supplies
sack_of_supplies.description: A linen sack of trade goods stolen from Rezlak's caravan by Dustwind harpies.

sarkoth_claw.name: Sarkoth's Claw
sarkoth_claw.description: A massive claw severed from the great scorpid Sarkoth.

burning_blade_medallion_item.name: Burning Blade Medallion
burning_blade_medallion_item.description: A medallion bearing the insignia of the Burning Blade Clan, taken from Yarrog Baneshadow.

item_test_scrap.name: Test Scrap
item_test_scrap.description: A piece of scrap used for testing.

scorpid_tail.name: Scorpid Tail

centaur_bracer.name: Centaur Bracer

small_venom_sac.description: A tiny sac of diluted venom, barely potent enough to notice.

small_leather_collar.description: A small leather collar, fitted for some creature's neck.

scorpid_stinger.description: A barbed stinger from a clattering scorpid. Still carries faint traces of venom.

clean_fishbones.description: A picked-clean set of fish bones, still faintly damp.

bloody_leather_boot.name: Bloody Leather Boot
bloody_leather_boot.description: A single leather boot, soaked through with blood.

dry_hardened_barnacle.name: Dry Hardened Barnacle
dry_hardened_barnacle.description: A calcified barnacle pried from a surf crawler's shell.

small_spider_leg.name: Small Spider Leg
small_spider_leg.description: A thin jointed leg from a small spider.

broken_spear.name: Broken Spear
broken_spear.description: The snapped haft of a spear.

linen_cloth.description: A bolt of coarse linen. Used in tailoring and first aid.

canvas_scraps.description: Torn scraps of heavy canvas, salvageable for patchwork. Humans and centaur alike use this material for tents and supply wrappings.

cracked_egg_shells.name: Cracked Egg Shells
cracked_egg_shells.description: The shattered remains of a leathery egg.

discolored_fang.name: Discolored Fang
discolored_fang.description: A yellowed fang stained with age and use.

zalaphil_insignia.name: Zalaphil's Insignia
zalaphil_insignia.description: The personal insignia of Watch Commander Zalaphil, taken after his defeat.

cracked_bill.name: Cracked Bill
cracked_bill.description: A cracked beak fragment from a scavenging bird.

heavy_leather.name: Heavy Leather
heavy_leather.description: Thick, tough leather from powerful creatures.

snapped_spider_limb.name: Snapped Spider Limb
snapped_spider_limb.description: A brittle spider limb broken at the joint.

bronze_feather.name: Bronze Feather

azure_feather.name: Azure Feather
azure_feather.description: A vivid blue flight feather from a Windfury harpy.

prospectors_pick.name: Prospector's Pick
prospectors_pick.description: A steel-headed mining pick bearing the Ironforge Prospectors' Guild stamp.

horn_of_arrachea.name: Horn of Arra'chea
horn_of_arrachea.description: The magnificent horn of Arra'chea, the ancient kodo of Mulgore. The Earthmother's rites demand it.

fizsprocket_clipboard.name: Fizsprocket's Clipboard
fizsprocket_clipboard.description: The site director's clipboard, covered in mining quotas and smuggling schedules for the Mulgore operation.

copper_bar.name: Copper Bar
copper_bar.description: A smelted copper bar, ready for smithing.

malachite.name: Malachite
malachite.description: A small green gemstone found in copper deposits.

shadowgem.name: Shadowgem
shadowgem.description: A dark purple gemstone found in copper deposits.

tigerseye.name: Tigerseye
tigerseye.description: A striking orange and black gemstone found in copper deposits.

light_leather.name: Light Leather
light_leather.description: Supple leather suitable for basic armor.

high_marshal_insignia.name: High Marshal's Insignia
high_marshal_insignia.description: The command badge of the Twilight High Marshal, stamped with the eye-and-void symbol of the Twilight's Hammer inner circle.

sand_terror_claw.name: Sand Terror Claw
sand_terror_claw.description: A serrated claw from a Silithid Sand Terror. The ridged cutting edge can split stone slabs ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â proof enough of the creature's danger.

sand_reaver_scale.description: A plate-sized scale from the Ancient Sand Reaver, worn smooth by millennia of burrowing through Silithus's volcanic rock.

wind_essence.name: Wind Essence
wind_essence.description: A glass vial of compressed elemental wind harvested from a Silithus storm elemental. It hums faintly when sealed.

obsidian_core.name: Obsidian Core
obsidian_core.description: The glowing volcanic heart of an Obsidian Destroyer. It cools from white to black within minutes of extraction.

hiveregal_venom_sac.name: Hive'Regal Venom Sac
hiveregal_venom_sac.description: A translucent sac of Hive'Regal venom, more concentrated than anything produced by lesser silithid colonies. Even an empty sac smells like dissolution.

deviate_scales.name: Deviate Scales
deviate_scales.description: Hard, gleaming scales from a large deviate serpent. They shimmer faintly with dream-energy.

kolkar_outrider_horn.name: Kolkar Outrider's Horn
kolkar_outrider_horn.description: A bone war horn taken from a Kolkar marauder. Used to signal raids on the Crossroads road.

fallen_warrior_arms.name: Fallen Warrior's Arms
fallen_warrior_arms.description: Weapons stripped from a fallen Alliance soldier by Kolkar centaur raiders. These deserve a proper burial.

naga_idol.name: Naga Idol
naga_idol.description: A serpentine idol carved from deep-sea coral, used by the Shattered Strand naga in their coastal rites.

blood_elf_sigil.name: Blood Elf Sigil
blood_elf_sigil.description: A small enameled sigil bearing the sunwell crest of the blood elves, worn by all members of the Azshara survey teams.

zhevra_hoof.name: Zhevra Hoof
zhevra_hoof.description: A firm, cloven hoof from a Zhevra Charger or Courser. Sergra Darkthorn collects these.

wildkin_feather.name: Wildkin Moon Feather
wildkin_feather.description: A large brown feather from a corrupted Wildkin, its tip discolored where the corruption has begun to eat through from within.

witchwing_talon.name: Witchwing Talon
witchwing_talon.description: A razor-sharp talon sheared from a Witchwing harpy at the Stagnant Oasis.

sunscale_raptor_head.name: Sunscale Raptor Head
sunscale_raptor_head.description: The severed head of a Sunscale raptor. Proof of another predator driven back from Crossroads territory.

azure_drake_eye.name: Azure Drake Eye
azure_drake_eye.description: The gleaming sapphire eye of the Elder Azure Drake, still smoldering faintly with contained storm-lightning.

strand_warlord_trident.name: Strand Warlord's Trident
strand_warlord_trident.description: The ceremonial trident of the Shattered Strand Warlord, recovered as proof that the naga commander has been slain.

deviate_hide.name: Deviate Hide
deviate_hide.description: A strange, iridescent hide shed by a deviate creature inside the Wailing Caverns. Leatherworkers prize these.

hezrul_blood.name: Hezrul's Blood
hezrul_blood.description: Dark centaur blood collected as proof that Hezrul Bloodmark has fallen. Gann Stonespire will recognize this.

satyr_horn.name: Satyr Horn
satyr_horn.description: A curved demonic horn shorn from a Legash satyr. Still faintly warm to the touch with fel energy.

highborne_runestone.name: Highborne Runestone
highborne_runestone.description: A rune-etched stone still radiating ten-thousand-year-old arcane energy from the ruins of ancient Highborne Azshara.

azure_whelp_scale.name: Azure Whelp Scale
azure_whelp_scale.description: A shimmering blue-silver scale from a young azure dragon. Crackling faintly with residual storm energy.

hippogryph_talon.name: Hippogryph Talon
hippogryph_talon.description: A hooked talon from one of Azshara's wild hippogryphs, prized by rangers and fletchers alike.

hivezora_wing.name: Hive'Zora Wing
hivezora_wing.description: A membranous wing from a Hive'Zora wasp, still faintly warm. Trimming the wasp population slows the hive's scouting range.

tar_sample.name: Tar Sample
tar_sample.description: A vial of volcanic tar scooped from the Lakkari Tar Pits. Scholars at Marshal's Refuge study its unusual elemental properties.

pterrordax_wing.name: Pterrordax Wing
pterrordax_wing.description: A leathery wing membrane from an Un'Goro pterrordax. The thin skin has an unusual tensile strength.

gorilla_pelt.name: Gorilla Pelt
gorilla_pelt.description: A thick pelt stripped from an Un'Goro gorilla. The dense fur is valued by traders in Gadgetzan.

bloodpetal_seed.name: Bloodpetal Seed
bloodpetal_seed.description: A dense, barbed seed from a bloodpetal plant. It exudes a faint sweet scent that masks its carnivorous nature.

scar_queen_carapace.name: Scar Queen Carapace
scar_queen_carapace.description: A plate of hardened chitin from the Slithering Scar Queen. Its strange iridescence hints at the arcane power the colony draws from Un'Goro's ley lines.

devilsaur_tooth.name: Devilsaur Tooth
devilsaur_tooth.description: A massive tooth wrenched from the jaw of an Un'Goro devilsaur. It weighs more than most swords.

silithid_mandible.name: Silithid Mandible
silithid_mandible.description: A razor-edged mandible from an Un'Goro silithid worker. Evidence of the colony's encroachment beyond the Slithering Scar.

ravasaur_claw.name: Ravasaur Claw
ravasaur_claw.description: A curved, serrated claw from an Un'Goro ravasaur. The edge holds a keen sharpness even after death.

jaedenar_sigil.name: Jaedenar Sigil
jaedenar_sigil.description: A Shadow Council identification sigil worn by all Jaedenar initiates, marking them as servants of the organization operating from Shadow Hold.

jadefire_warlord_horn.name: Jadefire Warlord's Horn
jadefire_warlord_horn.description: The ceremonial war horn of the Jadefire Warlord, used to signal demon raids across the length of Jadefire Run.

shadow_lord_seal.name: Shadow Lord's Seal
shadow_lord_seal.description: The Shadow Council seal of the Jaedenar Shadow Lord ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â his authority over all operations in Felwood, now shattered.

jadefire_idol.name: Jadefire Satyr Idol
jadefire_idol.description: A small demonic idol worshipped by the Jadefire satyrs, carved from obsidian and etched with binding runes in Eredun script.

angerclaw_fur.name: Angerclaw Grizzly Fur
angerclaw_fur.description: A clump of fel-matted grizzly fur from an Angerclaw bear. Still damp with the green ichor leaking through their corrupted skin.

deadwood_totem.name: Deadwood Totem
deadwood_totem.description: A carved totem carried by the Deadwood furbolg, its runes now twisted by fel energy into something unrecognizable from the originals.

irontree_sap.name: Irontree Corrupted Sap
irontree_sap.description: A vial of toxic green sap drained from a corrupted Irontree treant. Reeks of fel magic and burns skin on contact.

darkwhisper_lord_shard.name: Darkwhisper Lord's Shard
darkwhisper_lord_shard.description: A shard of fel crystal ripped from the Darkwhisper Lord's chest ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â the physical anchor binding the demon to Winterspring.

bloodfeather_wing.name: Bloodfeather Wing
bloodfeather_wing.description: A wing-feather bundle from a Bloodfeather harpy, stained crimson at the tips. Proof of the clan's defeat.

timberling_seed.name: Timberling Seed
timberling_seed.description: A dense, resinous seed from a corrupted Timberling. Denalan studies these to understand the blight spreading through Teldrassil.

gnarlpine_totem.name: Gnarlpine Totem
gnarlpine_totem.description: A crude bone totem carved by the corrupted Gnarlpine furbolg. The corruption of Teldrassil has warped even their ritual objects.

webwood_egg.name: Webwood Egg
webwood_egg.description: A silken-wrapped egg from a Webwood spider's nest. Carried back to be studied by Aldrassil's druids.

twilight_text_fragment.name: Twilight Text Fragment
twilight_text_fragment.description: A scrap of vellum covered in encrypted script ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â the private liturgy of the Twilight's Hammer cult. Cenarion scholars are working to decipher its contents.

grellkin_fang.name: Grellkin Fang
grellkin_fang.description: A small, needle-sharp fang pulled from a Grellkin imp. The corrupt energy still tingles in it.

webwood_venom_sac.name: Webwood Venom Sac
webwood_venom_sac.description: A translucent sac of potent venom harvested from a Webwood spider. Alchemists value this highly.

ursal_bear_paw.name: Ursal's Bear Paw
ursal_bear_paw.description: The enormous paw of Ursal the Mauler, hewn from the champion of the Gnarlpine. Proof presented to Athridas Bearmantle.

chimera_horn.name: Chillwind Chimera Horn
chimera_horn.description: A serrated horn from a Chillwind Chimera, prized by alchemists for the frost-volatile compounds within.

frostmaul_knuckle.name: Frostmaul Knuckle
frostmaul_knuckle.description: The enormous knuckle-bone of a Frostmaul Giant ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â a grim trophy proving the hunter survived contact with one.

winterfall_shaman_drum.name: Winterfall Shaman's Drum
winterfall_shaman_drum.description: The sacred ritual drum of the Winterfall High Shaman. Its beat once drove entire tribes into murderous frenzy.

cobalt_wyrm_scale.name: Cobalt Wyrm Scale
cobalt_wyrm_scale.description: A deep blue-grey scale from one of Winterspring's cobalt blue drakes, still faintly crackling with residual storm energy.

winterfall_totem.name: Winterfall Totem
winterfall_totem.description: A crude carved totem carried by Winterfall furbolg, imbued with corrupted elemental magic from their deranged shamans.

keltheril_rune.name: Kel'Theril Rune
keltheril_rune.description: An etched runestone pulled from beneath Lake Kel'Theril's ice, crackling with ten-thousand-year-old Highborne arcane energy.

yeti_pelt.name: Ice Thistle Yeti Pelt
yeti_pelt.description: A thick frost-white pelt from an Ice Thistle yeti, valued both for warmth and as proof of a successful hunt.

charred_basilisk_scale.name: Charred Basilisk Scale
charred_basilisk_scale.description: A heat-blackened scale from a Charred Basilisk. The fire has fused the chitin into an almost glass-like surface that reflects firelight in strange patterns.

grimtotem_spirit_totem.name: Grimtotem Spirit Totem
grimtotem_spirit_totem.description: A carved bone totem used by the Grimtotem shamans in their dark totemic rituals. The corrupted earth-spirit bound inside dissipates without the shaman to sustain it.

charred_ancient_ember.name: Ember of the Charred Ancient
charred_ancient_ember.description: A smoldering coal ripped from the heart of the Charred Ancient. Even in death this fragment of the ancient radiates immense heat. Brought to the druids as proof the Charred Vale's guardian has been put to rest.

sironas_mark.name: Sironas' Mark
sironas_mark.description: A signet ring engraved with Sironas' eredar insignia, recovered from the fallen man'ari. Brought to Prophet Velen as proof that the threat on Silvermyst Isle has been ended.

bloodfury_matriarch_talon.name: Bloodfury Matriarch's Talon
bloodfury_matriarch_talon.description: The enormous hooked talon of the Bloodfury Matriarch, sheared from her foot in the killing blow. The Sentinel commanders of Stonetalon Peak requested this as irrefutable proof of her death.

grimtotem_warclub_fragment.name: Grimtotem Warclub Fragment
grimtotem_warclub_fragment.description: A splintered fragment of a Grimtotem warclub, carved from Stonetalon heartwood and painted with dark clan markings. Proof of a Grimtotem warrior brought low.

wrath_hound_collar.name: Wrath Hound Collar
wrath_hound_collar.description: An iron collar stamped with the blood elf Sunhawk insignia. Proof that the wrath hounds of Bloodmyst Isle were bred and unleashed deliberately by the blood elf invaders.

ordanus_eye.name: Eye of Ordanus
ordanus_eye.description: The luminous eye of Ordanus, son of Cenarius. Though the ancient was maddened by corruption, his eye still glows with faint emerald light.

thunder_lizard_scale.name: Thunder Lizard Scale
thunder_lizard_scale.description: A thick scale from a Greater Thunder Lizard, crackling with residual electricity. Researchers are eager to study its conductive properties.

venture_co_badge.name: Venture Co. Identification Badge
venture_co_badge.description: A stamped metal badge issued to all Venture Company employees in Windshear Crag. Proof of an operative neutralized.

scorpid_pincer.name: Stoneclaw Scorpid Pincer
scorpid_pincer.description: A rock-crushing claw severed from a Stoneclaw Scorpid. The chitin is nearly as hard as iron and keeps its edge long after death.

razorfen_ritual_mask.name: Razorfen Ritual Mask
razorfen_ritual_mask.description: A carved hide mask worn by Razorfen geomancers during their thorn-rite ceremonies. The masks focus the shaman's attunement to the Overgrowth's ley-energy.

razorfen_snout_ring.name: Razorfen Snout Ring
razorfen_snout_ring.description: A bone ring driven through the snout of a Razorfen quilboar as a mark of martial rank. Each ring represents a confirmed kill in ritual combat.

bristleback_quill.name: Bristleback Quill
bristleback_quill.description: A hardened spine from a Bristleback quilboar, naturally sharper than any worked iron. Proof of a Bristleback warrior's death, and a useful fletching material to boot.

kolkar_khan_bracer.name: Khan's Iron Bracer
kolkar_khan_bracer.description: The engraved iron bracer of the Kolkar Khan, stripped from the warlord's foreleg. Proof beyond any doubt that the hold's commander has been slain.

kolkar_war_brand.name: Kolkar War Brand
kolkar_war_brand.description: An iron disk branded with the Kolkar clan's lightning-bolt sigil, worn on a cord by every centaur warrior in the warband. Proof of a Kolkar operative killed in the field.

plainstrider_plume.name: Plainstrider Plume
plainstrider_plume.description: A large display feather from a Greater Plainstrider. The iridescent quill is prized by Barrens fletchers for arrow crafting.

bristlelimb_totem.name: Bristlelimb Totem
bristlelimb_totem.description: A carved wooden totem of the corrupted Bristlelimb furbolg tribe. The Stillpine Hold elders request these as proof of the clan's diminishment.

kurken_idol.name: Kurken Idol
kurken_idol.description: A heavy obsidian idol worn around the neck of the Kurken. The Stillpine furbolg believe it holds the beast's corrupted spirit and must be cleansed by their high chief.

blood_elf_insignia.name: Blood Elf Insignia
blood_elf_insignia.description: A golden insignia bearing the crest of the blood elf organization that dispatched spies to Silvermyst Isle. Delivered to the Exodar as evidence of their agenda.

raptor_claw.name: Raptor Claw
raptor_claw.description: A curved talon from a Southern Barrens Raptor. Still razor-sharp despite being stripped from the animal.

naga_bracelet.name: Naga Bracelet
naga_bracelet.description: An ornate bracelet of Naga craft, looted from the Wrathscale who have seized the coastal docks. Proof that the naga presence on Azuremyst must be addressed.

shatterspear_hex_doll.name: Shatterspear Hex Doll
shatterspear_hex_doll.description: A voodoo fetish doll crafted by a Shatterspear witch doctor and linked to a specific target through ritual binding. Night elf scouts collect these as evidence of the Shatterspear threat.

athrikus_head.name: Athrikus Narassin's Head
athrikus_head.description: The severed head of the Twilight Hammer warlock Athrikus Narassin. Delivered to the Auberdine commander as proof that the Tower of Althalaxx has fallen and its dark master is slain.

chieftain_war_drum.name: Chieftain's War Drum
chieftain_war_drum.description: The ceremonial war drum of the Shatterspear Chieftain, used to rally the tribe for battle. Without it, the leaderless tribe will fracture ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â ending the Shatterspear threat to northern Darkshore.

sunhawk_insignia.name: Sunhawk Insignia
sunhawk_insignia.description: An engraved badge bearing the mark of the Sunhawk fleet, Admiral Saltheril's blood elf force. Collected as evidence of the military operation being conducted against the Draenei on Bloodmyst Isle.

razormaw_tooth.name: Razormaw's Tooth
razormaw_tooth.description: An enormous fang pulled from the jaw of the sea serpent Razormaw. Longer than a dwarf's forearm, it serves as proof that the guardian of the Hidden Reef has been slain.

twilight_tablet.name: Twilight Tablet
twilight_tablet.description: An obsidian tablet inscribed with Twilight Hammer elemental invocations. Night elf mages need these texts to understand the scope of the cult's ritual work in the Tower of Althalaxx.

moonstalker_fang.name: Moonstalker Fang
moonstalker_fang.description: A curved ivory fang from a Darkshore moonstalker. Night elf hunters prize these as trophies, and the teeth have minor alchemical uses.

zarakh_sigil.name: Zarakh's Sigil
zarakh_sigil.description: The personal sigil of the eredar commander Zarakh, recovered from the Vector Coil after his defeat. Prophet Velen will use it to confirm that the Burning Legion's operation on Bloodmyst Isle has ended.

thistle_bear_claw.name: Thistle Bear Claw
thistle_bear_claw.description: A broad, hooked claw from a grizzled thistle bear. These are used by night elf craftsmen to carve protective rune-patterns into wooden totems.

mathystra_relic.name: Mathystra Relic
mathystra_relic.description: An ancient night elf artifact excavated from the Ruins of Mathystra by the invading naga. Returning these relics to Auberdine will help historians reconstruct what was lost when the city fell.

blackwood_tablet.name: Blackwood Tablet
blackwood_tablet.description: A carved stone tablet bearing corrupted Blackwood totem-runes. Night elf druids in Auberdine hope these tablets will reveal the source of the blight corrupting the Blackwood furbolg den.

warsong_insignia.name: Warsong Insignia
warsong_insignia.description: A metal badge bearing the Warsong Clan's crossed axe emblem, worn by soldiers of the lumber camp. Proof of a Warsong soldier slain.

foulweald_totem.name: Foulweald Totem
foulweald_totem.description: A carved bone totem smeared with dark ointment from the Foulweald shamans' ritual fires. Still radiates faint corrupted energy.

xavian_demon_rune.name: Xavian Demon Rune
xavian_demon_rune.description: A jagged stone tile inscribed with a demonic glyph, carried by the Xavian satyrs as a mark of loyalty to Lord Xavialis.

lord_xavialis_horn.name: Lord Xavialis' Horn
lord_xavialis_horn.description: A twisted obsidian horn broken from Lord Xavialis' crown. Proof of the demon lord's defeat, brought back to the Sentinel commanders.

fel_spirit_essence.name: Fel Spirit Essence
fel_spirit_essence.description: A faintly glowing crystallized shard of fel energy left behind when a Fel Spirit is banished. Druids study these to understand Raynewood's corruption.

spitelash_crest.name: Spitelash Crest
spitelash_crest.description: A scale-plated crest shorn from a Spitelash naga. Proof of the encroachment pushed back from Ashenvale's rivers.

nazzivus_relic.name: Nazzivus Relic
nazzivus_relic.description: A carved demonic relic carried by the Nazzivus satyrs and felsworn. These artifacts are used in their dark rituals to siphon fel energy from the tainted crystals of Bloodmyst Isle.

wrathtail_scale.name: Wrathtail Scale
wrathtail_scale.description: A large iridescent scale pried from a Wrathtail naga at the Hidden Reef. These scales are prized by Draenei craftsmen for their natural resistance to water and arcane damage.

bloodmyst_ravager_fang.name: Bloodmyst Ravager Fang
bloodmyst_ravager_fang.description: A serrated fang from a Bloodmyst ravager, hardened by the corrupted environment of the isle. Draenei scouts collect these as evidence of the ravager population's explosive growth.

ghostpaw_pelt.name: Ghostpaw Pelt
ghostpaw_pelt.description: The thick grey pelt of a Ghostpaw Runner. Soft to the touch despite the wolf's savage nature.

corrupted_feather.name: Corrupted Feather
corrupted_feather.description: A feather from a corrupted owlkin of Bloodmyst Isle, stained a deep crimson by the tainted energies that have warped the creature beyond recognition.

charlga_severed_tusk.name: Charlga's Severed Tusk
charlga_severed_tusk.description: One of Charlga Razorflank's ceremonial tusks, etched with death runes in the Scourge style. The death magic that infused her still crackles faintly along its surface.

sprite_darter_wing.name: Sprite Darter Wing
sprite_darter_wing.description: A translucent wing membrane from a Sprite Darter Nymph. It pulses faintly with stored nature energy even after being removed.

hippogryph_feather.name: Hippogryph Feather
hippogryph_feather.description: A long primary feather from a Feralas hippogryph, iridescent green in certain light. Coveted by fletchers and enchanted quill merchants.

yeti_fur.name: Yeti Fur
yeti_fur.description: A thick matted hank of fur from a Feral Scar Yeti. The insulating properties are exceptional ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â leatherworkers pay well for clean samples.

gnoll_tooth.name: Gnoll Tooth
gnoll_tooth.description: A jagged canine tooth from a Woodpaw gnoll. The gnolls string these as necklaces to count kills ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â collecting them demoralizes the pack.

gordunni_rune_stone.name: Gordunni Rune Stone
gordunni_rune_stone.description: A carved stone inscribed with crude Gordunni ogre runes. These are used as territorial markers and crude magical foci throughout the ogre camps.

deserter_insignia.name: Deserter's Insignia
deserter_insignia.description: A Theramore military insignia defaced with crude scratch marks. Collected as proof of dealing with deserters preying on the marsh supply routes.

grimscale_totem.name: Grimscale Totem
grimscale_totem.description: A fish-bone and shell totem carried by Grimscale murlocs as a spiritual ward. The carvings depict a tidal wave swallowing an entire fleet.

grimscale_oracle_idol.name: Grimscale Oracle Idol
grimscale_oracle_idol.description: A carved coral idol carried by the Grimscale High Oracle as a focus for tribal lightning magic. Still crackles faintly with residual energy.

kodo_hoof.name: Kodo Hoof
kodo_hoof.description: A massive hoof from one of Desolace's roaming kodo herds. Requested by drovers tracking the health of the remaining kodo population.

wyrmbog_matriarch_scale.name: Wyrmbog Matriarch's Scale
wyrmbog_matriarch_scale.description: An obsidian-black scale the size of a buckler, pried from the Wyrmbog Matriarch's flank. Proof that the ancient dragon's reign over the bog has ended.

harpy_wing_tip.name: Harpy Wing Tip
harpy_wing_tip.description: The primary flight feather bundle from a Frayfeather harpy's wing. The quills are as stiff as iron wire.

sandfury_war_drum.name: Sandfury War Drum
sandfury_war_drum.description: A small bone drum used by Sandfury trolls to signal battle formations within Zul'Farrak's walls.

silithid_chitin.name: Silithid Chitin Shard
silithid_chitin.description: A jagged fragment of silithid carapace, nearly as hard as iron. Evidence of the growing hive menace in southern Tanaris.

dunemaul_ogre_hide.name: Dunemaul Hide Scrap
dunemaul_ogre_hide.description: A thick scrap of leathery hide from a Dunemaul ogre, used as proof of the clan's numbers being reduced.

gahzrilla_scale.name: Gahz'rilla Scale
gahzrilla_scale.description: A massive frost-rimmed scale from the hide of Gahz'rilla. Cold to the touch even in the scorching Tanaris heat.

sandfury_high_priest_idol.name: Sandfury Idol
sandfury_high_priest_idol.description: A troll idol carved from bleached desert bone, still radiating the dark prayers of the Sandfury High Priest.

immol_thar_essence.name: Immol'thar's Essence
immol_thar_essence.description: A crystallized shard of fel energy that coalesced from Immol'thar's body at the moment of his death. It radiates intense demonic power even in containment.

gordunni_warchief_skull.name: Gordunni Warchief's Skull
gordunni_warchief_skull.description: The enormous two-headed skull of the Gordunni Warchief. Without him the tribe will splinter ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â this is the proof that it has been done.

wastewander_journal.name: Wastewander Journal
wastewander_journal.description: A weathered journal from a Wastewander bandit detailing caravan routes and ambush spots across Tanaris.

southsea_coin.name: Southsea Doubloon
southsea_coin.description: A gold-plated coin stamped with the Southsea Freebooters' anchor crest, minted in Lost Rigger Cove.

basilisk_eye.name: Stonescale Basilisk Eye
basilisk_eye.description: The crystalline eye of a Tanaris basilisk, still faintly luminous. Alchemists prize it for petrification antidotes.

dustwallow_hyena_fang.name: Dustwallow Hyena Fang
dustwallow_hyena_fang.description: A hyena's crushing molar from one of the marsh packs. Worn as a trophy by hunters who have cleared a cackle from the caravan routes.

elder_crone_fetish.name: Elder Crone's Fetish
elder_crone_fetish.description: The Grimtotem Elder Crone's personal spirit-fetish, a bundle of bone, hide, and charged stone that acted as her anchor to the dark totemic spirits she commanded. Brought to Freewind Post as proof of her death.

darkcloud_pinnacle_relic.name: Darkcloud Pinnacle Relic
darkcloud_pinnacle_relic.description: A stone totem-fragment recovered from the ritual sites atop Darkcloud Pinnacle. The Elder Crone's shamans use these in the binding rites that keep the pinnacle's spirit-wards active.

galak_warlord_standard.name: Galak High Warlord's Standard
galak_warlord_standard.description: The iron-tipped war standard of the Galak High Warlord, planted at the entrance of Splithoof Hold as a declaration of Galak sovereignty over Thousand Needles. Its fall signals the end of the High Warlord's conquest.

moongraze_tendons.name: Moongraze Tendons
moongraze_tendons.description: Tough tendons harvested from a moongraze stag or buck. Used in Draenei cooking and leatherworking.

ravager_hide.name: Ravager Hide
ravager_hide.description: A section of tough, chitinous hide peeled from a ravager. Despite its alien texture it is surprisingly workable.

saltstone_eye.name: Saltstone Eye
saltstone_eye.description: The crystalline eye of a Saltstone Basilisk, still faintly refracting light in the petrification spectrum. Studied by Freewind Post's shamans to understand the creature's gaze attack.

screeching_swoop_gizzard.name: Swoop Gizzard
screeching_swoop_gizzard.description: The muscular gizzard of a Screeching Swoop, packed with ground stones the bird uses to digest its food. Alchemists prize these for their unusual mineral content.

galak_brand.name: Galak Brand
galak_brand.description: An iron brand bearing the Galak clan's lightning-fork sigil, burned into the hide of every Galak centaur as an initiation mark. Proof of a Galak warrior slain.

grimtotem_raider_mark.name: Grimtotem Raider Mark
grimtotem_raider_mark.description: A carved bone medallion worn by Grimtotem raiders at Darkcloud Pinnacle as a mark of their sept affiliation. Each one represents a confirmed enemy kill in the pinnacle's defense.

galak_storm_crystal.name: Galak Storm Crystal
galak_storm_crystal.description: A quartz crystal charged by a sustained lightning strike and then attuned by a Galak Stormer as a magical focus. Even after the stormer's death the crystal crackles with residual charge.

healing_crystal.name: Healing Crystal
healing_crystal.description: A fragment of crystallized healing energy shed from the Exodar's engines. The Draenei healers of Ammen Vale collect these to treat the crash survivors.

magram_overlord_skull.name: Magram Overlord's Skull
magram_overlord_skull.description: The cracked skull of the Magram Overlord, proof of victory over the clan's warmaster. Without him the centaur will scatter.

satyr_shadow_gem.name: Satyr Shadow Gem
satyr_shadow_gem.description: A crystallized shard of shadow magic recovered from the satyrs of Sargeron. It still pulses with faint dark energy.

bloodfen_raptor_claw.name: Bloodfen Raptor Claw
bloodfen_raptor_claw.description: A curved black claw from a Bloodfen raptor. The edge is still razor sharp even after being torn free.

snapjaw_crocolisk_scale.name: Snapjaw Crocolisk Scale
snapjaw_crocolisk_scale.description: A thick keratin scale pried from a Dustwallow crocolisk. Armorsmiths prize these for their exceptional resistance to bladed weapons.

darkmist_spider_silk.name: Darkmist Spider Silk
darkmist_spider_silk.description: A dense coil of silk harvested from the Darkmist widows. Far stronger than ordinary silk and highly prized by tailors and weavers.

gelkis_centaur_horn.name: Gelkis Centaur Horn
gelkis_centaur_horn.description: A spiraling horn from a Gelkis centaur. The rival clan to the Magram, the Gelkis carve tribal markings into their horns.

scorpashi_pincer.name: Scorpashi Pincer
scorpashi_pincer.description: A razor-edged pincer severed from a Scorpashi. The chitin is dense enough to resist even a sharp blade.

burning_blade_seal.name: Burning Blade Seal
burning_blade_seal.description: A demonic seal worn by Burning Blade cultists at Mannoroc Coven. Bears the sigil of their dark patron.

magram_centaur_horn.name: Magram Centaur Horn
magram_centaur_horn.description: A spiraling horn from a Magram centaur. The Magram file their horns to sharp points as a war ritual.

mannoroc_demon_dust.name: Mannoroc Demon Dust
mannoroc_demon_dust.description: Residual fel ash left when a Mannoroc demon is slain. Valuable to warlocks and alchemists studying demonic energy.

benedicts_key.name: Benedict's Key
benedicts_key.description: A worn iron key. Its owner is no longer around to miss it.

soul_shard.name: Soul Shard
soul_shard.description: A fragment of a creature's soul, captured by a warlock's Drain Soul. Disappears if the warlock dies or is benched.
